2026-0388
2026-04-29FINCanadian International Trade Tribunal ActAppointment of a full-time temporary member of the Canadian International Trade TribunalAppointment of Greg Gallo of Ottawa, Ontario, to be full-time a temporary member of the Canadian International Trade Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of fifteen months, effective May 11, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of a full-time temporary member of the Canadian International Trade Tribunal
precis: Appointment of Greg Gallo of Ottawa, Ontario, to be full-time a temporary member of the Canadian International Trade Tribunal, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of fifteen months, effective May 11, 2026.
